text.title: Logstash Pipeline Configuration and Tuning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Do sources produce multiple formats OR PII masking is required?

conclusion.verdict: Use Filebeat direct to ES (no Logstash).
Single Logstash node, multi-pipeline, DLQ on
Multi-node Logstash + Kafka buffer + tuned workers

text.example: needs_logstash=true → throughput_lt_10k → single-node multi-pipeline. References rule multi-pipeline-isolation.
